word: G3133 - μαραίνω - maraínō - mar-ah'-ee-no - Fade away

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to extinguish to render arid, make to waste away, to cause to wither
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of uncertain affinity; to extinguish (as fire), that is, (figuratively and passively) to pass away: - fade away.
